_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the storybook's page universe. The scanner (usage-scan.py), the editing server (server.py) and the storybook (storybook.html) all read this. ⚠️ server.py only EDITS the pages listed here — a page missing from this list is silently skipped by Merge/Replace, so keep it complete. status: 'canonical' = adopted, shown normally + audited. 'candidate' = under review: audited but quarantined in the 'Under review' group until promoted. group = where a canonical page appears (Pages / Organisms / Flows). scrollText (optional) = scroll the live preview to the element whose text matches.

pages.name: Talents
pages.desc: The earlier Talents page — kept for comparison against Talents (v2).

pages.desc: Event detail — the virtual job fair. Shares .ev-hero with Summit and Chat & Learn.

pages.desc: Event detail — Chat & Learn. Sibling of Virtual job fair and Summit.

pages.name: Unified nav — Option 2
pages.desc: The unified top nav — Option 2, with the logged-in view right below. Live from nav-options.html. Hover items; shrink the width to see the mobile drawer.

pages.desc: The canonical nav + top-alert bar, in every state.

pages.desc: The common / for-all event signup — 'Building on AI: a Chat & Learn'. The latest flow, live.
